title: 1x1 Potato
description: The lowest-res Minecraft: every texture flattened to a single flat color. A tiny, potato-quality novelty pack.
body:
# 1x1 Potato

**Minecraft, but every texture is one flat color.** 1x1 Potato squishes each texture down to its single average color — the ultimate "potato graphics" pack. Blocks become clean solid colors, the whole world turns into a minimalist, low-detail toy version of Minecraft, and the download is tiny.
There are some texturepacks already out there that does the exact same thing, but I have not found any that stays up to date with newer versions.

## What it does

- Collapses **every texture** to a single flat color (its average).
- A clean, **minimalist, ultra-low-detail** look — like Minecraft rendered on a potato.
- **Shapes still read**: items, plants and thin blocks keep their outlines, so you can still tell things apart.
- **Glass stays see-through** — rendered as a flat tinted pane instead of disappearing.
- Pure resource pack: **no mods required**.
